createvoidway.void_chest.insufficient_st: Void chests require sufficient stress on the bottom shaft to operate
createvoidway.void_chest.insufficient_tr: Void chests require void transfer fluid from the left or right side to operate
createvoidway.void_chest.no_transfer_flu: Insufficient void transfer fluid to operate
createvoidway.void_chest_input.role: Input: stores items into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_chest_output.role: Output: extracts items from the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_chest.not_linked: No paired void chest on this frequency
createvoidway.void_chest.needs_rotation: Connect a rotating shaft to enable transfer
createvoidway.void_chest.no_shaft: No shaft connected on the bottom face
createvoidway.void_chest.no_stress_sourc: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.void_battery.no_transfer_f: Insufficient void transfer fluid to operate
createvoidway.void_battery_input.role: Input: stores energy into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_battery_output.role: Output: extracts energy from the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_battery.not_linked: No paired void battery on this frequency
createvoidway.void_battery.needs_rotatio: Connect a rotating shaft to enable transfer
createvoidway.void_battery.no_shaft: No shaft connected on the bottom face
createvoidway.void_battery.no_stress_sou: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.void_motor_input.role: Input: injects stress into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_motor_input.not_linke: No paired output on this frequency
createvoidway.void_motor_input.no_transf: Insufficient void transfer fluid to inject stress
createvoidway.void_motor_input.injecting: Injecting stress into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_motor_input.needs_rot: Connect a rotating shaft to inject stress
createvoidway.void_motor_input.no_stress: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.void_motor_output.waiting_: Waiting for channel stress from inputs
createvoidway.void_motor.not_linked: No paired motor on this frequency
createvoidway.ponder.lshaped_gearbox.hea: Relaying Rotational Force using L-Shaped Gearboxes
createvoidway.ponder.lshaped_gearbox.tex: Changing directions can get bulky quickly
A more compact alternative to this setup is using a Gearbox, but two shafts go unused
With an L-Shaped Gearbox you can make this in a cleaner and cheaper way
By Right-clicking it with a Wrench, you can change the orientation of the secondary axis
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_1: Void Motors can transmit Rotational Force across distances
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_2: Placing items in the two upper slots can specify a Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_3: Right-click the bottom slot to unclaim the Void Motor
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_4: Right-click it again to re-claim it
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_5: If a Void Motor is claimed, only it's owner is able to edit it's Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_6: A Void Motor will only receive Rotational Force from Void Motors with the same Frequency and Owner
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_1: Void Chests can transmit Items across distances
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_2: Placing items in the two upper slots can specify a Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_3: Right-click the bottom slot to unclaim the Void Chest
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_4: Right-click it again to re-claim it
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_5: If a Void Chest is claimed, only it's owner is able to edit it's Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_6: A Void Chest will only receive Items from Void Chests with the same Frequency and Owner
createvoidway.void_tank_input.role: Input: stores fluids into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_tank_output.role: Output: extracts fluids from the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_tank.not_linked: No paired void tank on this frequency
createvoidway.void_tank.needs_rotation: Connect a rotating shaft to enable transfer
createvoidway.void_tank.no_shaft: No shaft connected on the bottom face
createvoidway.void_tank.no_stress_source: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank.text_1: Void Tanks can transmit Fluids across distances
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank.text_2: Placing items in the two upper slots can specify a Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank.text_3: Right-click the bottom slot to unclaim the Void Tank
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank.text_4: Right-click it again to re-claim it
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank.text_5: If a Void Tank is claimed, only it's owner is able to edit it's Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank.text_6: A Void Tank will only receive Fluids from Void Tanks with the same Frequency and Owner
createvoidway.ponder.void_battery.text_1: Void Batteries can transmit Energy across distances
createvoidway.ponder.void_battery.text_2: Placing items in the two upper slots can specify a Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_battery.text_3: Right-click the bottom slot to unclaim the Void Battery
createvoidway.ponder.void_battery.text_4: Right-click it again to re-claim it
createvoidway.ponder.void_battery.text_5: If a Void Battery is claimed, only it's owner is able to edit it's Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_battery.text_6: A Void Battery will only receive Energy from Void Batteries with the same Frequency and Owner
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.wrench_b: Wrench the link, then wrench this pad to bind
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.link_no_: Bound link has no frequency configured
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.paired: Paired with another pad on this frequency
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.unpaired: Not paired — place a second pad with the same link frequency
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.conflict: Frequency conflict — %s pads linked; all disabled
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.no_shaft: No shaft connected on the bottom face
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.needs_ro: Connect a rotating shaft to enable teleporting
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.no_stres: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.no_trans: Insufficient void transfer fluid to teleport
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.ready: Ready to teleport all entities on the pad at once
createvoidway.void_teleport_pad.insuffic: Insufficient fluid for batch (need %s mB, %s entities)
createvoidway.void_portal.not_square: Portal opening must be square (width equals height)
createvoidway.void_portal.not_in_frame: Not part of a valid portal frame
createvoidway.void_portal.paired: Paired with another portal on this frequency
createvoidway.void_portal.unpaired: Not paired — build a second portal with the same frequency
createvoidway.void_portal.insufficient_s: Stress port needs a rotating shaft on its front or back
createvoidway.void_portal.no_transfer_fl: Insufficient void transfer fluid to open portal
createvoidway.void_portal.no_shaft: No shaft connected on front or back
createvoidway.void_teleport_link.role: Configures frequency for adjacent void teleport pads
createvoidway.void_teleport_link.no_freq: Set both frequency slots to bind nearby pads
createvoidway.void_teleport_link.wrench_: Wrench this link, then wrench an adjacent pad
createvoidway.void_teleport_bind.not_adj: Link and pad must share a face
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor_io.text_: Void Motor Inputs inject stress from a rotating shaft into a shared void channel
Void Motor Outputs act as adjustable stress sources for the channel they share a Frequency with
Matching Frequency and Owner pairs an Input with its Outputs across any distance
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest_io.text_: Void Chest Inputs push items into a shared void channel when supplied with stress
Void Chest Outputs pull items from that channel onto adjacent logistics
Both sides need a rotating shaft below and Void Transfer Fluid piped into their sides
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank_io.text_1: Void Tank Inputs store fluids from adjacent pipes into a shared void channel
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank_io.text_2: Void Tank Outputs release stored fluids from the channel to nearby pipes
createvoidway.ponder.void_tank_io.text_3: A rotating shaft below each block is required to drive the transfer
createvoidway.ponder.void_battery_io.tex: Void Battery Inputs deposit FE from adjacent sources into a shared void channel
Void Battery Outputs supply FE from the channel to adjacent consumers
Like other void devices, both sides require stress and Void Transfer Fluid to operate
createvoidway.ponder.void_teleport.text_: Void Teleport Pads instantly move every entity standing on them to a paired pad
Place a Void Teleport Link coplanar and adjacent to configure the pad's Frequency
Place items in the Link's two upper slots to define its Frequency
Wrench the Link, then wrench the adjacent Pad to bind them together
Build a second Link + Pad pair with the same Frequency — only one partner pad is allowed per channel
Supply a rotating shaft below each pad and keep Void Transfer Fluid available to enable teleporting
createvoidway.ponder.void_portal.text_1: Build a hollow square frame of Void Portal Frame blocks with a square opening
createvoidway.ponder.void_portal.text_2: The bottom row must contain exactly one Fluid Port, Connector, and Stress Port —in any order, side by side
createvoidway.ponder.void_portal.text_3: Set the Connector's Frequency like other void devices to pair with a remote portal
createvoidway.ponder.void_portal.text_4: Connect a rotating shaft to the Stress Port's front or back face
createvoidway.ponder.void_portal.text_5: Pipe Void Transfer Fluid into the Fluid Port to fuel the portal
createvoidway.ponder.void_portal.text_6: When paired with another valid portal on the same Frequency, the opening fills and entities teleport after standing inside for 3 seconds
createvoidway.ponder.void_transfer_fluid: Void Transfer Fluid is the catalyst consumed by many void devices while they operate
Pipe it into the sides of Void Chests, Batteries, and Teleport Pads, or into Void Motor Inputs
Void Portals draw the fluid through their dedicated Fluid Port instead
createvoidway.void_node_terminal.insuffi: Void Node Terminal requires a rotating shaft below
Void Node Terminal requires void transfer fluid from the sides
Not enough void transfer fluid to teleport
createvoidway.void_node_terminal.frequen: Set both Frequency slots before opening the terminal
createvoidway.void_node_terminal.cannot_: You are already at this terminal
createvoidway.void_node_terminal.no_node: No other terminals found on this Frequency
Stress demand: %1$s SU at %2$s SU channel load
createvoidway.void_node_terminal.dimensi: That dimension is not currently loaded
createvoidway.void_node_terminal.invalid: That terminal is no longer available
The Void Node Terminal lists other Void Node Terminals on its Frequency — even in other dimensions
Set both Frequency slots like other void devices before using the terminal
Supply a rotating shaft below and pipe Void Transfer Fluid into the sides to keep it running
Other Void Node Terminals on the same Frequency appear in the list
Right-click while operational to open the interface — rename terminals or teleport to any entry
Cross-dimensional nodes are prefixed with their dimension; teleporting costs void transfer fluid
